metadata.title: Wafinix — Website, System & App Development
metadata.description: A software house for small businesses to enterprises: websites, POS & ERP systems, integrated orders & payments, AI & chatbots. Indonesia & global.

footer.blurb: We help your business grow with thoughtfully crafted websites, systems, and apps — from small businesses to enterprises, for Indonesia and the world.

home.blurb: Websites, systems, and apps for your business — from small businesses to enterprises. The full site is under construction.
